what_is_interesting: The Indus Valley Civilization was larger than Egypt and Mesopotamia combined at its peak — and it vanished completely, leaving a script no one has ever decoded, so we still don't know what they called themselves or why they disappeared.
likely_image: Ancient ruins of Mohenjo-daro or Harappa — crumbling brick structures, dusty and still, possibly with a hazy or dreamlike color grade to match the sleep-channel aesthetic.
winner_reasoning: Paired with ruins imagery, 'JUST VANISHED' creates instant eerie dread — the viewer looks at a once-great civilization reduced to rubble and those two words promise: 'you are about to find out what happened to millions of people, and the answer is unsettling.'
